seoTitle: Memsensing News | Product Releases, Company Updates, Industry Insights
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from Memsensing including new product releases, technology advancements, company milestones, and industry trends in MEMS sensors.

articles.title: Memsensing Expands Automotive Sensor Portfolio with New AEC-Q100 Qualified Pressure Sensors
articles.summary: Memsensing announces expansion of its automotive-grade pressure sensor lineup with new models targeting TPMS, engine management, and HVAC applications, all featuring AEC-Q100 Grade 0 qualification.
content: Memsensing has significantly expanded its automotive sensor portfolio with the introduction of several new AEC-Q100 qualified pressure sensors designed to meet the demanding requirements of modern vehicle applications. The new product lineup includes enhanced versions of the popular MSP series with improved accuracy, wider temperature ranges, and additional diagnostic features.

The expanded portfolio specifically targets three key automotive application areas: Tire Pressure Monitoring Systems (TPMS), engine management, and HVAC control. Each product has undergone rigorous qualification testing to meet AEC-Q100 Grade 0 standards, ensuring reliable operation from -40°C to +150°C.

Key improvements in the new product lineup include enhanced accuracy to ±0.5% full scale, faster response times under 1ms, and reduced power consumption for battery-powered TPMS applications. The sensors also feature improved EMC performance to meet the latest automotive electromagnetic compatibility requirements.

BeiLuo Electronics, as an authorized core distributor of Memsensing products, is now stocking these new automotive sensors and providing comprehensive technical support for customer integration. Engineering samples and evaluation kits are available immediately for qualified customers.

articles.title: Memsensing Launches Industrial Pressure Transmitter Series for Process Control Applications
articles.summary: New MSM-P series industrial pressure transmitters feature 4-20mA output, IP67 enclosures, and ±0.5% accuracy for demanding industrial process control and automation applications.
content: Memsensing has introduced a new series of industrial pressure transmitters designed specifically for process control and automation applications. The MSM-P series combines Memsensing's proven MEMS sensing technology with robust industrial-grade packaging and standard 4-20mA output signals.

The transmitter series covers pressure ranges from 0-100kPa to 0-2MPa, making them suitable for a wide variety of industrial applications including hydraulic systems, pneumatic control, HVAC, and water treatment. All models feature ±0.5% full-scale accuracy and IP67 enclosures for reliable operation in harsh environments.

Key features of the MSM-P series include 316L stainless steel wetted parts for broad media compatibility, two-wire 4-20mA connection for simple installation, and comprehensive temperature compensation ensuring accuracy across the -20°C to +80°C operating range.

BeiLuo provides full technical support for the MSM-P series including application engineering assistance, calibration services, and customization options for specific industrial requirements. The transmitters are available from stock with competitive pricing and short lead times.

articles.title: Memsensing Achieves AEC-Q100 Qualification for Digital MEMS Microphone Family
articles.summary: The MSM-261S series digital MEMS microphones receive AEC-Q100 Grade 3 qualification, enabling deployment in automotive voice recognition and hands-free communication systems.
content: Memsensing has successfully achieved AEC-Q100 Grade 3 qualification for its MSM-261S series of digital MEMS microphones, opening new opportunities for deployment in automotive voice recognition, hands-free communication, and in-cabin voice control systems.

The qualification covers the entire MSM-261S product family including both high-sensitivity (-26dBV) and standard (-38dBV) variants. All qualified products feature 64dB SNR, digital PDM output, and operation from -40°C to +85°C, meeting the stringent requirements of automotive applications.

Automotive applications for these qualified microphones include voice recognition for navigation and infotainment control, hands-free telephone systems, driver monitoring voice interfaces, and emergency call systems. The digital PDM interface simplifies integration with modern automotive audio processors and enables multi-microphone beamforming arrays.

BeiLuo's automotive FAE team is available to support customers with reference designs, acoustic optimization guidance, and EMC compliance recommendations for integrating these microphones into automotive systems.

articles.title: BeiLuo Electronics Expands Partnership with Memsensing to Include Full Product Portfolio
articles.summary: BeiLuo Electronics strengthens strategic partnership with Memsensing, becoming an authorized core distributor for the complete range of MEMS sensors including pressure sensors, microphones, and accelerometers.
content: BeiLuo Electronics is pleased to announce the expansion of its strategic partnership with Memsensing, a leading Chinese MEMS sensor manufacturer. Under the enhanced agreement, BeiLuo becomes an authorized core distributor for Memsensing's complete product portfolio.

The expanded partnership covers all Memsensing product categories: pressure sensors for automotive and industrial applications, MEMS microphones for consumer and automotive electronics, accelerometers for motion sensing applications, and integrated sensor modules. BeiLuo will maintain strategic inventory and provide comprehensive technical support for the entire product range.

This partnership expansion reflects the growing demand for high-quality, cost-effective MEMS sensors in the Asia-Pacific market. Memsensing's products offer competitive performance compared to international brands while providing shorter lead times and better local support.

BeiLuo customers will benefit from access to Memsensing's latest products, priority allocation during supply constraints, dedicated FAE support, and competitive pricing. The partnership also enables joint development of customized sensor solutions for specific customer requirements.

articles.title: Memsensing Achieves IATF 16949 Certification for Automotive Quality Management
articles.summary: Memsensing's manufacturing facilities receive IATF 16949 certification, demonstrating commitment to automotive quality standards and enabling expanded OEM partnerships.
content: Memsensing has achieved IATF 16949 certification for its manufacturing facilities, joining the ranks of automotive-qualified suppliers worldwide. This internationally recognized quality management standard demonstrates Memsensing's commitment to meeting the stringent quality requirements of the automotive industry.

The IATF 16949 certification covers all aspects of Memsensing's operations including design, manufacturing, testing, and quality assurance for automotive-grade MEMS sensors. The certification audit verified compliance with requirements for defect prevention, variation reduction, and continuous improvement.

This achievement enables Memsensing to expand its partnerships with major automotive OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers who require IATF 16949 certification from their component suppliers. The certification complements Memsensing's existing AEC-Q100 product qualifications.

BeiLuo Electronics, as Memsensing's core distributor, can now provide customers with full traceability and quality documentation required for automotive production. This includes PPAP documentation, material certifications, and full lot traceability.

articles.title: Memsensing Introduces MSA Series Automotive Accelerometers for Safety Systems
articles.summary: New MSA series MEMS accelerometers target automotive safety applications including airbag systems, electronic stability control, and rollover detection with AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualification.
content: Memsensing has introduced the MSA series of automotive-grade MEMS accelerometers specifically designed for vehicle safety applications. The new product family includes variants with ±50g and ±100g measurement ranges to address different safety system requirements.

The MSA series features AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualification, digital SPI/I2C interfaces, and built-in self-test functionality required for automotive safety systems. The accelerometers achieve low noise density of 350-400 μg/√Hz and offer programmable bandwidth from 0.5Hz to 2kHz.

Target applications include airbag crash detection and discrimination, electronic stability control (ESC), anti-lock braking systems (ABS), rollover detection, and vehicle dynamics control. The ±100g variant is optimized for crash detection algorithms, while the ±50g variant provides better resolution for vehicle dynamics applications.

BeiLuo provides comprehensive support for MSA series integration including reference algorithms for crash detection, PCB layout guidelines for EMC compliance, and functional safety documentation. Engineering samples are available for evaluation.

articles.title: Memsensing Expands Production Capacity to Meet Growing Demand
articles.summary: Major capacity expansion at Memsensing's Suzhou manufacturing facility increases output by 50% to support growing demand from automotive and industrial markets.
content: Memsensing has completed a major expansion of its manufacturing facility in Suzhou, China, increasing production capacity by 50% to meet growing demand for MEMS sensors. The expansion includes additional cleanroom space, new automated test equipment, and enhanced quality control systems.

The capacity expansion specifically targets the rapidly growing automotive sensor market, where Memsensing has secured design wins with major Chinese and international OEMs. Additional capacity is also allocated to industrial sensor modules for process control applications.

New equipment installed includes advanced wafer-level testing systems, automated calibration stations, and high-speed packaging lines. These investments improve manufacturing efficiency while maintaining the high quality standards required for automotive applications.

BeiLuo customers will benefit from improved lead times and increased availability of Memsensing products. The expanded capacity also enables faster response to customer demand fluctuations and supports the launch of new products.

articles.title: Memsensing Ships 100 Millionth MEMS Sensor
articles.summary: Memsensing reaches major milestone with shipment of 100 millionth MEMS sensor, demonstrating market acceptance and manufacturing scale.
content: Memsensing has achieved a significant milestone with the shipment of its 100 millionth MEMS sensor since the company's founding in 2015. This achievement demonstrates the market's acceptance of Memsensing's technology and the company's ability to scale manufacturing to meet global demand.

The milestone shipment includes pressure sensors, MEMS microphones, and accelerometers deployed across automotive, industrial, consumer electronics, and IoT applications. Automotive applications represent the fastest-growing segment, driven by increasing sensor content per vehicle.

Quality metrics accompanying this milestone show field failure rates below 50 parts per million (ppm) for automotive-grade products, demonstrating that high volume production can be achieved while maintaining stringent quality standards.

BeiLuo Electronics has been instrumental in Memsensing's growth, serving as a key distribution partner and helping to introduce Memsensing products to a broad customer base across multiple industries. The partnership continues to expand with new product introductions and growing customer adoption.
